body.body: Word-graph training passes run back-to-back. Inter-trial intervals (spacing effect) improve retention in biological learning — same should apply here. Space passes over time rather than bulk. Design + implement scheduling for wg training passes.
body.title: Space word-graph passes with inter-trial intervals
body.result: SPACING_INTERVALS_DAYS=[1,3,7,21] in training_corpus.py. _next_pass_ts(pass_count, anchor_ts) computes next pass timestamp. schedule_training_passes() sets next_pass_ts on complete books, idempotent, supports reset=True. train_due_passes() runs re-training for overdue books, increments pass_count, advances schedule. Two tools registered in training.py. 9 tests pass.
